title: Seed-Content Intermediate Representation (IR)
description: Per-record IR schema emitted by SP13 Stage 1 ir-builder.sh. Consumed by Stage 2 INFER (T-4 cluster + T-5 taxonomy).

path.description: Absolute path of the source file (or paste tmp file).

format.description: Detected format. `unsupported` carries a 'format not supported' marker rather than dropping the record on the floor.

detected_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 timestamp when the format was detected (UTC).

normalized_text.description: Parser output. For binaries without an available extractor, contains a '[binary content not extracted: ...]' marker. For unsupported formats, contains a '[format not supported: ...]' marker.

metadata.description: Format-specific metadata (e.g., frontmatter fields, transcript participants). T-3 ships an empty {}; downstream parsers populate.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 prefix (16 chars) of the source file content. Used by Stage 2 for de-duplication and by retrofit (T-13) for idempotency.
